title: Drinkable Gunpowder!
description: Adds the ability to drink gunpowder and blow others up with it!
body:
Did you not ever just stared at gunpowder and thought "hmmm, I wanna drink that!" but you couldn't?

Well if you wanted too this is the mod for you!

With this mod you will be able to pack gunpowder into a bottle and drink it! It will provide a effect that will allow you to explode your friends and enemies to smithereens!

(Disclaimer, effect will only work with a bare fist in main hand due to complications (it would be to overpowered lol) and due to the sheer instability of the ability to drink gunpowder, you will shortly implode 10 seconds after consumption :/)



Minecorp is not responsible for any loss of limbs, death, or any other ailment caused by consuming gunpowder

please god don't consume gunpowder in real life, I beg of you :(
